name: pdd-167-item-manager
description: 物品收纳管家 - 全栈物品收纳管理应用

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,blue "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.check: npm run check:types && npm run check:build
